items.definition_en: A water can is a container for pouring water on plants.
items.example_en: She filled the water can to water the flowers.

items.definition_en: A hose is a long tube for carrying water.
items.example_en: He used the hose to water the grass.

items.definition_en: A lawnmower is a machine for cutting grass.
items.example_en: My dad pushes the lawnmower every weekend.

items.definition_en: A rake is a tool for gathering leaves or grass.
items.example_en: We used the rake to collect dry leaves.

items.definition_en: A shovel is a tool for digging soil.
items.example_en: He picked up the shovel to plant a tree.

items.definition_en: A glove is something you wear to protect your hand.
items.example_en: Wear a glove when you pull weeds.

items.definition_en: A weed is an unwanted plant in the garden.
items.example_en: There is a weed growing between the flowers.

items.definition_en: A wheelbarrow is a small cart for carrying things.
items.example_en: He carried soil in the wheelbarrow.

items.definition_en: A trowel is a small hand tool for digging and planting.
items.example_en: She used a trowel to plant flowers.

items.definition_en: A spade is a tool with a flat blade for digging.
items.example_en: He bought a new spade for his garden work.

items.definition_en: A pruner is a tool used to cut small branches.
items.example_en: She used the pruner to trim the bushes.

items.definition_en: Compost is decayed plants used to help other plants grow.
items.example_en: They put all vegetable waste into the compost.

items.definition_en: Fertilizer is something added to soil to help plants grow.
items.example_en: We put fertilizer on the garden every spring.

items.definition_en: A seed is what you plant to grow a new plant.
items.example_en: He planted a seed in the garden bed.

items.definition_en: Mulch is material spread on the soil to keep it wet and healthy.
items.example_en: They used mulch around the trees to keep the soil moist.

items.definition_en: A hedge trimmer is a tool used to cut and shape bushes.
items.example_en: He used the hedge trimmer to make the hedge look nice.

items.definition_en: A garden bed is a section of soil for planting flowers or vegetables.
items.example_en: The tomatoes are growing well in the garden bed.

items.definition_en: A sprinkler is a device that sprays water on the garden.
items.example_en: The sprinkler watered the entire lawn this morning.

items.definition_en: Soil is the top layer of ground where plants grow.
items.example_en: The soil in this garden is very rich.

items.definition_en: A garden fork is a tool with long prongs used for digging and turning soil.
items.example_en: She used the garden fork to loosen the earth.
